name: Ensō Shadow Memory
description: Shadow-mode observer for the Ensō memory system: runs Ensō recall alongside the active memory plugin on every turn and logs divergence. Never modifies prompts, never owns the memory slot (WP-7).

corpusRoot.label: Corpus Root
corpusRoot.help: Root of the canonical Ensō Markdown corpus (the directory containing memory/)

ensoBinary.label: enso-recall Binary
ensoBinary.help: Path to the enso-recall binary (built from github.com/clockworksoul/enso cmd/enso-recall)

timeoutMs.label: Timeout (ms)
timeoutMs.help: Hard deadline for one enso-recall invocation; on timeout the turn proceeds untouched and the timeout is logged

shadowLogDir.label: Shadow Log Directory
shadowLogDir.help: Where divergence JSONL files land; defaults to <corpusRoot>/.enso/shadow
